title: crepidomanes intermedium
intro: Crepidomanes intermedium, also known as the intermediate creeping fern, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. It is native to tropical Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. The plant is believed to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help alleviate conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. In terms of herbal preparations, Crepidomanes intermedium is typically used in teas, infusions, or decoctions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
